description: Mafia clan originating from Barcellona Pozzo di Gotto, Sicily. Active since the second half of the 20th century, it was involved in the 1986 maxi-trial in Messina. The clan's structure is described as chaotic with shifting alliances, and it has connections with other mafia groups including the Santapaola family of Catania and Calabrian and Neapolitan organizations.
